caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap and a green t-shirt with the text "I CAN NEVER P..." and "SHI..." is seated in a room, speaking into a professional black microphone. He is wearing large black headphones and looking slightly to his left. Behind him is a white mannequin wearing a white t-shirt and a wall adorned with numerous framed photographs. To the right, a rack of clothing is partially visible. Two logos appear on the screen: a circular logo on the left containing the text "TOW" and a red logo on the right that reads "HOTLY" and "TOT". Across the sequence, the man's facial expressions change slightly as he speaks, with his mouth opening and closing, but his position and the surrounding environment remain static.
